name: buddy-script
description: Buddy Script — full-stack social app (Next.js + NestJS + PostgreSQL/Prisma)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix api run start:dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix api run build && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix api install && npm --prefix web install
